SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ApprovalQueueController
Approval-queue screen, visible to a DEPT_MANAGER only (gated in MainShellController).
AuthController
Owns the authentication / registration domain (login, logout, single-login lock, subscriber & guide registration).
AuthDAO
Data access object for authentication: staff/visitor credential lookups and the single-login lock backed by the active_session table.
BaseController
Lifecycle base for screens that participate in the realtime push channel.
CancellationsReportController
Cancellations report screen, visible to a DEPT_MANAGER only (gated in MainShellController).
CancellationsReportController.ParkOption
Park dropdown entry: carries the id (null for "All parks") but renders the name.
CancellationsReportDTO
Result of the Cancellations report: a per-day breakdown of cancelled and no-show reservations over a date range, optionally narrowed to one park, with range totals and a daily average.
CancellationsReportRow
One per-day row of the Cancellations report: how many reservations were cancelled and how many were marked no-show on a single calendar day.
ChangeStatus
Lifecycle status of a parameter_change_request.
ClientConnection
Persistent TCP connection to the GoNature server with async request/response correlation and unsolicited-event support.
ClientConnection.ConnectionClosedException
Surfaces a connection drop to any thread waiting in ClientConnection.sendRequest(ClientRequest) as a typed IOException so callers can distinguish it from generic stream failures.
ClientRequest
Represents a request sent from the client to the server.
ClientSession
Per-connection server-side state for one client.
ConfirmTimeoutJob
Auto-cancels reminded PENDING reservations that were not confirmed within the window.
DashboardController
Dashboard: a role-aware overview that greets the logged-in actor, shows a few real summary cards plus an attention line, and offers a quick-link launchpad.
DBConnection
Manages the connection to the system's MySQL database.
DomainController
A handler for one domain's slice of the server's request space (orders, reservations, parks, …).
DotEnv
Represents the dot env component of the GoNature application.
EventBus
Process-wide bus that dispatches ServerEvents pushed from the server to interested local subscribers on the JavaFX Application thread.
EventBus.Subscription
Handle returned by EventBus.subscribe(common.dto.SubscriptionKey, java.util.function.Consumer<common.dto.ServerEvent>) so callers can detach themselves without holding references to the underlying callback or key.
EventOp
Kind of change carried by a ServerEvent on the realtime push channel.
GateController
The park-gate screen, visible to a PARK_EMPLOYEE only (gated in MainShellController; the server also re-checks the role on every op).
GoNatureClientApp
Application entry point for the client.
GuideRegisterController
SERVICE_REP-only form that registers a visitor as a group guide.
MainShellController
Controls the persistent shell: sidebar nav, topbar title, connection pill, the logged-in user chrome, and the contentArea swap point.
MainShellController.NavItem
One sidebar entry: the screen plus the rule deciding who may see it.
MemberDAO
Data access object for member registration: the visitor base row plus the subscriber and guide extension rows that a SERVICE_REP creates.
Navigator
Owns the content area inside the main shell and provides safe, animated navigation between role-authorized screens.
Navigator.Screen
Describes one navigable screen.
NetworkService
Thin async wrapper around ClientConnection.
NetworkService.ConnectionListener
Contract for connection listener behavior in the GoNature application.
NetworkService.ProbeResult
Result bundle for NetworkService.probe(String, int).
NoShowJob
Marks past CONFIRMED reservations that nobody ever entered the park for as ReservationStatus.NO_SHOW.
NotificationCenterController
Notification center, reachable from the sidebar by any logged-in actor.
NotificationController
Owns the notification domain: listing the logged-in actor's messages and acknowledging them.
NotificationDAO
Data access object for the notification table.
NotificationDTO
Immutable data transfer object representing a notification row — a simulated/popup message addressed to exactly one recipient (a visitor or a staff user).
NotificationService
Small stateless helper that other controllers call to send a notification to a single recipient (a visitor or a staff user).
OccupancyDTO
Immutable data transfer object describing the live occupancy of a single park.
OrderServer
Represents the order server component of the GoNature application.
ParameterChangeDAO
Data access object for the parameter_change_request table — the persistence behind the park-parameter approval workflow.
ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Immutable data transfer object representing a parameter_change_request row — the unit of the park-parameter approval workflow.
ParamField
The park parameter targeted by a parameter_change_request.
ParkController
Owns the park & parameter-change domain: park lookup, the booking-dropdown park list, capacity availability, and the parameter-change request/approve/reject workflow.
ParkDAO
Data access object for the park table.
ParkDTO
Immutable data transfer object representing a park row.
ParkParamsController
Park-parameter edit screen, visible to a PARK_MANAGER only (gated in MainShellController).
PricingService
Computes the price of a reservation, in the same unit as reservation.price_cents.
ReminderJob
Sends confirmation reminders for upcoming PENDING reservations.
ReportController
Owns the reporting domain: the Visits-by-Type and Cancellations reports the department manager runs across the region.
ReportDAO
Read-only data access object backing the department manager's reports.
RequestRouter
Central request dispatcher.
RequestType
Enumeration of request type values used by the GoNature application.
ReservationController
Owns the reservation & waiting-list domain (create/get/update/cancel/list, confirm, join/leave waitlist, accept grab).
ReservationCreateController
Booking form for a new park reservation (INDIVIDUAL / FAMILY / GROUP visits).
ReservationCreateController.ParkOption
Park dropdown entry: carries the id but renders the name.
ReservationDAO
Data access object for the reservation table.
ReservationDTO
Immutable data transfer object representing a single park reservation.
ReservationListController
"My Reservations" screen: look up a visitor's reservations by id and manage them.
ReservationStatus
Lifecycle state of a ReservationDTO.
ReservationUpdateResultDTO
Result of a successful RequestType.UPDATE_RESERVATION: the freshly persisted ReservationDTO bundled with the price before and after the edit, so the client can settle the difference.
Role
Staff role of a user row.
SchedulerConfig
Timed-job thresholds, read once from the .env file (via DotEnv) with sensible production defaults baked in.
SchedulerJob
One timed maintenance task driven by SchedulerService.
SchedulerService
Runs the registered SchedulerJobs on a shared ScheduledExecutorService, polling every SchedulerConfig.getPollSeconds() seconds.
ServerEvent
A change notification pushed from the server to subscribed clients.
ServerGUI
JavaFX GUI for managing the GoNature server.
ServerGUI.ClientRow
Represents a connected client entry displayed in the table.
ServerListener
Contract for server listener behavior in the GoNature application.
ServerResponse
Represents a response sent from the server to the client.
Session
Holds connection details and the logged-in identity for the lifetime of the client process.
StartServer
Represents the start server component of the GoNature application.
SubscriberRegisterController
SERVICE_REP-only form that registers a new subscriber.
SubscriptionKey
Identifies a single subscribable resource on the server — the pair (entity name, numeric id) that a client wants change events for.
SubscriptionRegistry
Process-wide registry mapping each SubscriptionKey to the set of ClientSessions that want change events for it.
UsageReportController
Usage report screen.
UsageReportController.ParkOption
Park dropdown entry: id is null for all parks.
UsageReportDTO
Result of the Usage Report: park/day rows where the park did not reach full capacity in the selected range.
UsageReportRow
One row in the Usage Report, showing a park/day in which the park was not fully occupied according to recorded visits.
UserDTO
Immutable data transfer object representing an authenticated staff user.
UserLoginController
Controller for UserLoginView.fxml — the combined connect + sign-in screen that runs at startup and again after logout.
UserLoginController.Quick
One seeded account reachable via a quick-login button: staff carry a username; visitors carry a visitorId (the other is null).
VisitController
Owns the visit domain: park entry by reservation, exit, casual walk-ins, and live occupancy.
VisitDAO
Data access object for the visit table — one row per party that physically enters a park, by reservation or as a casual walk-in.
VisitDTO
Immutable data transfer object representing a single visit row — one party's actual entry into a park (by reservation or as a casual walk-in).
VisitorDTO
Immutable data transfer object representing a visitor who logged in by national ID.
VisitsReportController
Visits-by-Type report screen, visible to a DEPT_MANAGER only (gated in MainShellController).
VisitsReportController.ParkOption
Park dropdown entry: carries the id (null for "All parks") but renders the name.
VisitsReportDTO
Result of the Visits-by-Type report: per-category visit counts and average stay lengths over a date range, optionally narrowed to one park.
VisitsReportRow
One grouped row of the Visits-by-Type report: the aggregate figures for a single visitor category over the report's date range and park filter.
VisitType
The nature of a park visit booked on a ReservationDTO.
WaitlistController
"My Waiting List" screen (visitor-facing): the logged-in visitor's WAITING reservations, fetched via LIST_WAITLIST.
WaitlistController.TickTarget
One offered row's countdown state: where to write, and which Accept to disable at zero.
WaitlistDAO
Data access object for the waiting_list_entry table.
WaitlistEntryDTO
Immutable data transfer object representing a single waiting-list entry — a visitor's queue position for a park/date that was full when they booked.
WaitlistGrabExpiryJob
Sweeps expired waiting-list grab offers.
Widgets
Reusable view fragments shared by multiple screen controllers.
